data.title: Oil Prices Move Higher As Syrian Rebels Take Control Of Damascus
data.description: The situation remains fluid and the United Nations Security Council is set to discuss the developments and implications for regional stability on Monday afternoon. Financial markets are reacting to the increased uncertainty in the region, as well.

data.title: Why Is Cogent Biosciences Stock Trading Higher On Monday?
data.description: Cogent Biosciences' SUMMIT trial shows bezuclastinib improves symptoms and quality of life in systemic mastocytosis, with favorable safety data.

data.title: Victoria's Secret Gains From Key Promotion Turning Point, Says Analyst
data.description: Victoria's Secret (VSCO) gets upgrade from analyst Matthew Boss of JPMorgan on continued same-store sales growth.
